title: helichrysum glaciale
intro: Helichrysum glaciale, also known as the White Ice Helichrysum, is a plant species in the daisy family, native to the mountains of Europe. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Helichrysum glaciale include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies for various health conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oil, which can be used topically or internally to reap its therapeutic benefits.
